params.prompt: Photorealistic editorial interior reference photograph of a Taste. Focus tightly on: kitchen cabinets, range hood, kitchen island or counter, warm wood cabinetry, matte black hardware, clear sightline to dining nook, tidy counter with one curated object, warm wood cabinetry or wood-grain veneer, clean counters with one curated object, visible sightline to dining area. Styled in japandi aesthetic, warm_neutral palette, soft_ambient lighting. A calm, warm Japandi interior tuned for a young family: quiet minimalism balanced with earthy textures, natural wood tones, and selective layering. Prioritize horizontal lines, low-profile furniture, tactile materials (linen, wool, rattan), and visible daylight from large openings. Add a compact standing-desk work corner in the living area and a small crib in the bedroom without disrupting the serene composition. This image is a visual consistency reference — every detail of the featured furniture and fixtures must be clearly visible and precisely rendered. No people. No visible brand logos. Sharp architectural photography. Luxury real estate staging.
